title: Enchantment Glint Outline
description: Adds a customisable outline to enchanted items. Works with resource packs and vanilla shaders. Sodium compatible
body:
![# Enchantment Glint Outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/89219ba9253b0f00e1afad8da4fae2344ff92fd5.png)
Adds a customisable outline to enchanted items inspired by the Actions and Stuff resource pack on Bedrock.

![An image showing off different effects on enchanted diamond swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Qx2rzv1x/images/93e92f52cbece1e482bc80140878be590f8c8b45.png) ### Customisable Using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/project/mOgUt4GM) and [YACL](https://modrinth.com/project/1eAoo2KR) allows you to customise styles, color, and toggle features of the mod at any time ### Why a mod and not a resource pack? Using a mod allows **support for custom resource packs features** - meaning you can still change item models and the glint texture via resource packs, and it'll still work (see gallery). It will even work with **items that are added by other mods**, so long as they don't handle their own rendering. ### Does it work with Sodium? **Yes!** Despite Sodium changing a lot of the Minecraft rendering code, the mod should still work in such a way that Sodium's changes won't affect it (check compatibility in the specific version page before downloading). _However_ the mod still changes rendering, so it might conflict with other mods that dramatically change rendering, such as shaders.
